ai_summary: **Executive Summary: Indbank Merchant Banking Services Limited Q1 2026 Unaudited Financial Results (Revised)**  Indbank Merchant Banking Services Limited reported strong unaudited Q1 2026 financial results, with profit after tax rising significantly by 104% quarter-over-quarter to 237.53 Lakhs and 11% year-over-year, driven by robust growth in fees and commission income and reduced total expenses. The submission was a minor administrative revision to remove unrequired columns, with the company explicitly confirming no changes whatsoever to the financial figures or other disclosures. There are no apparent red flags, as the statutory auditors have issued an unmodified review conclusion.
